document_metadata.title: WIN: A Double Pass To The Washboard Union
document_metadata.first_words: Canadian country trio The Washboard Union are making their Australian debut right now, and fans are finally getting their shot to see the high energy country show the band is renowned for. chunks.content: Canadian country trio **The Washboard Union** are making their Australian debut right now, and fans are finally getting their shot to see the high energy country show the band is renowned for. The Washboard Union made up of **Chris “Dunner” Duncombe**, **Aaron Grain**, and **David Roberts** have stacked up awards and achievements back in Canada over the last decade. Musically, The Washboard Union blend a warm mix of folk and country with pop sensibilities. Think strong harmonies, contemporary sounds and choruses designed for sing along moments. Their newest single *Somebody to Love* leans into that sound, producing a chorus made to echo in crowd settings, all while staying grounded in storytelling and roots. For people who value authenticity, connection and live energy, The Washboard Union’s set is going to feel like a breath of fresh air. Whether you came for the harmonies, the banjo, the honest lyrics, or just to see a band build something real, this tour feels like their moment. To celebrate their long awaited Australian tour, we’re giving you the chance to win tickets to see The Washboard Union live at one of their headline shows. Whether you’re a long-time fan or new to the party, this is your moment to see one of country music’s most dynamic trios do what they do best.

The Washboard Union made up of Chris “Dunner” Duncombe, Aaron Grain, and David Roberts have stacked up awards and achievements back in Canada over the last decade.

Musically, The Washboard Union blend a warm mix of folk and country with pop sensibilities. Think strong harmonies, contemporary sounds and choruses designed for sing along moments. 

Their newest single Somebody to Love leans into that sound, producing a chorus made to echo in crowd settings, all while staying grounded in storytelling and roots.

For people who value authenticity, connection and live energy, The Washboard Union’s set is going to feel like a breath of fresh air. Whether you came for the harmonies, the banjo, the honest lyrics, or just to see a band build something real, this tour feels like their moment.

To celebrate their long awaited Australian tour, we’re giving you the chance to win tickets to see The Washboard Union live at one of their headline shows. Whether you’re a long-time fan or new to the party, this is your moment to see one of country music’s most dynamic trios do what they do best.

THE WASHBOARD UNION
AUSTRALIAN TOUR 2025

10 October - Savannah in the Round, Mareeba QLD
12 October - The Triffid Garden, Brisbane QLD
14 October - Islington Barracks Hotel, Islington NSW
15 October - Six String Brewing Company, Erina NSW
16–17 October - SXSW Sydney, NSW
18 October - The Beer Shed, Leumeah NSW 

Embedded Content

Click the button above to enter. Competition closes Midnight on Sunday, October 12. *Please note the prize is tickets only. No travel or accomodation is included in the prize.

markdown_content:
Canadian country trio **The Washboard Union** are making their Australian debut right now, and fans are finally getting their shot to see the high energy country show the band is renowned for. The Washboard Union made up of **Chris “Dunner” Duncombe**, **Aaron Grain**, and **David Roberts** have stacked up awards and achievements back in Canada over the last decade.

Musically, The Washboard Union blend a warm mix of folk and country with pop sensibilities. Think strong harmonies, contemporary sounds and choruses designed for sing along moments.

Their newest single *Somebody to Love* leans into that sound, producing a chorus made to echo in crowd settings, all while staying grounded in storytelling and roots.

[Embedded Content](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5UbKRI-y6CM&list=RD5UbKRI-y6CM&start_radio=1)

For people who value authenticity, connection and live energy, The Washboard Union’s set is going to feel like a breath of fresh air. Whether you came for the harmonies, the banjo, the honest lyrics, or just to see a band build something real, this tour feels like their moment.

To celebrate their long awaited Australian tour, we’re giving you the chance to win tickets to see The Washboard Union live at one of their headline shows. Whether you’re a long-time fan or new to the party, this is your moment to see one of country music’s most dynamic trios do what they do best.

### **THE WASHBOARD UNION AUSTRALIAN TOUR 2025**

10 October - Savannah in the Round, Mareeba QLD  
12 October - The Triffid Garden, Brisbane QLD  
14 October - Islington Barracks Hotel, Islington NSW  
15 October - Six String Brewing Company, Erina NSW  
16–17 October - SXSW Sydney, NSW  
18 October - The Beer Shed, Leumeah NSW

[Embedded Content](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zveadXpPemM&list=RDzveadXpPemM&start_radio=1)

**Click the button above to enter.** Competition closes Midnight on Sunday, October 12. *\*Please note the prize is tickets only. No travel or accomodation is included in the prize.*
